mapper.insert: insert into orders (`number`, order_status, seller_id, buyer_id, rider_id, order_type, send_address_id, receive_address_id, order_time, pay_time, take_time, delivery_complete_time, receive_time, cancel_time, update_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, goods_amount, delivery_fee, remark, seller_consignee, seller_phone, send_address, buyer_consignee, buyer_phone, receive_address, cancel_reason, rejection_reason) values (#{number}, #{orderStatus}, #{sellerId}, #{buyerId}, #{riderId}, #{orderType}, #{sendAddressId}, #{receiveAddressId}, #{orderTime}, #{payTime}, #{takeTime}, #{deliveryCompleteTime}, #{receiveTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{updateTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{goodsAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{remark}, #{sellerConsignee}, #{sellerPhone}, #{sendAddress}, #{buyerConsignee}, #{buyerPhone}, #{receiveAddress}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason})
